creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
This is your sign to visit Hampton Court 🌸

The Mitre Hotel in Hampton Court serves a fantastic afternoon tea on its terrace @mitrehamptoncourt @theultimateprovence 🥂 You can also hire a boat and sail along the River Thames 🚤

The hotel itself is a historic riverside boutique stay, offering beautiful views, cosy rooms, and elegant design ✨

It’s located right next to Hampton Court Palace, where you can explore stunning state apartments, as well as gardens and galleries 🏰🌿 @historicroyalpalaces 

📍Hampton Court 

📸 @kseniia.journey with @londoncoffeeshops 😊
